stem: A school is comparing star and mesh network topologies before refitting a classroom.
model_answer: {"Star": ["Every device has its own cable to a central switch", "If the central switch fails the whole network goes down"], "Mesh": ["Devices forward traffic for each other", "Adding more devices increases overall reliability"]}
review_notes: Tick every feature that applies. Each row scores up to 2; partial credit allowed.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Tick every feature that applies to each topology.

columns: Every device has its own cable to a central switch
If the central switch fails the whole network goes down
Devices forward traffic for each other
Adding more devices increases overall reliability
correctByRow: Every device has its own cable to a central switch
If the central switch fails the whole network goes down
Devices forward traffic for each other
Adding more devices increases overall reliability

mark_points.text: Star — own cable to central switch
Star — single point of failure at the switch
Mesh — devices forward traffic for each other
